failedAssertions.reason: Assertion requires active agents to be expanded by default; current dashboard default renders active agents collapsed.
Required stream transcript content types were absent in expanded dashboard agent block.
Transcript formatting does not satisfy the contract requirement for $-prefixed warn-colored tool calls, and error-body text is not consistently dead-colored.
Comment body text does not resolve to muted foreground; computed paragraph color is rgb(255,255,255).
Properties panel values render at 11px rather than the required 10px.
Sidebar section headers are not uppercase and do not apply the required letter-spacing treatment.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded gui-detail-polish fixture-seeding pattern (extra issues/comments + seeded agent statuses) to avoid blocked assertions in reruns.
